recommendation_context: review filters and execution thresholds because the runner is failing to convert opportunities
improve model quality and data coverage before promoting this family
tighten entry logic and retrain for better trade selection quality

maintenance_request.reason: Blocked at paper stage. The latest evaluation fails three hard vetoes (`failure_rate_above_15pct`, `negative_slippage_stress`, `regime_robustness_below_minimum`) and also misses core paper gates (`monthly_roi_pct=-1.3246`, `baseline_beaten_windows=0`, `stress_positive=false`, `paper_days=29`). Repeated recent variants in the same family show the same failure-rate and execution-feasibility pattern, so this looks structurally weak rather than merely stale. `contrarian_legacy` shows some directional signal (54 closed trades, 68.52% win rate) but not enough economic quality to offset negative PnL and gating failures.

target_objective: reduce missed settlement windows while improving strict-gate pass rate on funding dislocations
